name: Hollow Ember
author: ImAsra
description: Warm ember and ash neumorphic theme. Deep near-black base with smouldering orange accent. inspired by Bad Omens – THE DEATH OF PEACE OF MIND

1.3.9: Bug reported by Legislate3030 on github.
Fix: row controls (favorite/heart, star rating, bulk-select checkbox, preview) inside track rows can be clicked reliably again.
The press animation was scaling the whole row on :active, which shifted controls out from under the cursor mid-click and silently swallowed the click.
1.3.8: Fix: collapsed sidebar nav buttons are now square and icon-sized.
1.3.7: Fix: the album rail's prev/next arrows work again. The card shadow now gets room inside the rail instead of switching off its overflow, which had disabled the arrows.
1.3.6: made volume slider more visible by making it brighter
1.3.4: Fix: allow album-card box-shadow glow to render above album cards (overflow: visible).
Add breathing room for first row of album cards.
Normalize star rating rendering (emoji SVG adjusted and background-size set to 12x12).
